title: HR Intern
description:
Instawork is on a mission to create meaningful economic opportunities for skilled hourly professionals in communities around the globe. Our AI-powered labor marketplace helps local businesses scale, and enables global technology companies to push the frontiers of robotics and AI. Backed by world-class investors like Benchmark, Spark Capital, Craft Ventures, Greylock, Y Combinator, and others, we’re looking for exceptional talent to reimagine the way the world works.

Location: Kormangala, Bangalore

Working Days: 6 Days a Week

Experience: Fresher (0–1 year)

Duration: 3 months

About the Role:

We are looking for a proactive and energetic HR Intern to support our day-to-day recruitment activities. This role is perfect for someone who wants to kick-start their career in HR, enjoys interacting with people, and thrives in a fast-paced startup environment.

Key Responsibilities:


Support end-to-end hiring for fresher and entry-level roles
Source, screen, and call candidates for various positions
Schedule and coordinate interviews with hiring panels
Maintain candidate trackers and ensure timely follow-ups
Assist in releasing offer letters and completing onboarding documentation
Ensure strong communication and coordination between candidates and internal stakeholders
Contribute to improving hiring processes and candidate experience



Requirements:


Good written and verbal communication skills
Strong organizational and follow-up abilities
Proactive attitude and willingness to learn
Comfortable working in a dynamic startup environment
Ability to manage multiple tasks at once
Available to work 6 days a week



Additional information:


Free Lunch + Snacks Daily
Cool workspace and fun team environment
Exclusive project goodies



Our Values


Empathy, Trust & Candor We put ourselves in the shoes of our colleagues and customers and don’t shy away from uncomfortable conversations, instead building trust through honest and direct feedback.
Bias for Action We practice high-velocity decision-making, clear-eyed that we often operate with incomplete information. Growing quickly means it’s OK to be wrong, so long as we learn from our mistakes and course correct!
Always Be Learning We’re a curious bunch, and with AI transforming our workplace we encourage everyone to learn from each other, compounding our knowledge and experience to help us change an entire industry.
Act Like an Owner We work long, hard, and smart, building products that delight our users and drive growth. Your ability to impact Instawork is limited only by your courage and conviction, not your job description.



About Instawork

Founded in 2015, Instawork is the nation’s leading online labor marketplace for food services, hospitality, light industry, and logistics, connecting more than 7M skilled workers with local restaurants, hotels, warehouses, stadiums, and more. Our AI-powered platform serves thousands of businesses across more than 50 major markets in the United States and Canada. We're not just helping fill shifts, we're supporting local economies—and we're just getting started!

Instawork has been featured by CBS News, The Wall Street Journal, The Washington Post, and the Associated Press. Forbes included us on their Next Billion Dollar Startups list; RetailTech Breakthrough named us Workforce Hiring Solution of the Year for 2025; and Inc. 5000 recognized us as one of the country's top 10% fastest-growing companies two years in a row. But what matters most is our impact. We're solving real problems for real people, and we’re doing it at scale.

Join our team to help us build something that matters! We’re looking for superstars who want to help us shape the future of work. With hubs in San Francisco, Bangalore, and Chicago, city offices in New York, Phoenix, and Singapore, we're back to working together in-person five days a week because we believe the best ideas happen when great people collaborate face-to-face. We also value diverse perspectives and encourage applications from candidates of all backgrounds.

Ready to make an impact? Learn more at www.instawork.com/about.

Personnel Privacy Policy

title: Sales Associate & Intern
description:
Location: Bengaluru (Indiranagar)

Reporting to: Sales Manager

Full Time: Fresher to 2 years

Internship: at least 3 months mandatory




About Lane

At Lane, we’re reimagining how India learns driving and experiences car ownership. From structured driving programs to car buying & selling within our trusted community, we’re building a tech-enabled mobility ecosystem for first-time drivers. With 15,000+ registrations and strong early traction, we’re scaling fast — and sales sits at the heart of our growth journey.




Role Overview

As a Sales Associate & Intern, you will drive revenue by converting high-intent leads into paying customers. You’ll work closely with marketing, operations, and customer success teams to ensure a seamless experience from first interaction to onboarding. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys speaking with customers, understands consultative selling, and wants to grow in a fast-paced startup environment.




Key Responsibilities

Convert inbound leads into customers via calls and WhatsApp
Understand customer requirements and recommend the right driving package
Manage follow-ups and maintain strong pipeline hygiene
Track daily conversions and revenue targets
Coordinate with operations for smooth onboarding
Maintain CRM data accuracy
Identify customer objections and improve pitch quality
Upsell relevant services (RTO assistance, car buying support, etc.)




What We’re Looking For

Fresher to 2 years of experience in inside sales / telesales / EdTech / mobility / service sales
Strong communication skills (English + Hindi preferred; Kannada is a bonus)
High ownership mindset
Comfortable working with targets and performance metrics
Basic understanding of Google Sheets / CRM tools
Ability to handle objections confidently
Startup attitude — adaptable, fast learner, action-oriented




What You’ll Gain

Direct exposure to startup growth and revenue strategy
Clear performance metrics & learning curve
Opportunity to grow into senior sales / city lead roles
High ownership from Day 1
Work closely with founders




Why Join Lane?

Because we’re not just selling driving lessons — we’re building confidence, independence, and a trusted car ownership ecosystem for India’s next generation of drivers. If you’re excited about mobility, growth, and building something meaningful — we’d love to meet you.

title: Sales and Operations Intern
description:
Sales & Operations Intern (Paid Internship)




📍 Bangalore | ⏱ Duration: 6 months | Stipend: INR 20,000/month

Must have a two-wheeler and valid driving license




Are you a fresher looking to kickstart your career in sales?

Do you love meeting new people, presenting ideas, and solving problems?

Join Kyrobar, a fast-growing IoT startup transforming inventory management for premium hotels and pubs.




Kyrobar is revolutionizing inventory management for bars, restaurants, and hotels with our smart IoT solution. Trusted by brands like Toit, Ironhill, Taj, and Marriott,..etc we’re expanding rapidly and looking for a Sales & Operations Intern who thrives in the field, loves talking to clients, and wants to be part of a fast-growing startup.




What You’ll Do:

Sales

Identify and reach out to new leads in the hospitality sector
Schedule and conduct client meetings and product demos
Support in closing deals and onboarding new clients
Maintain CRM with leads, meetings, and follow-ups




Operations & Account Management

Coordinate product installations and client training
Provide field support to clients and resolve operational queries
Track client usage data and report variances or improvement areas
Build and maintain strong client relationships




Requirements:

Based in Bangalore and willing to travel locally for meetings
Own two-wheeler and valid license (mandatory)
Excellent communication and people skills
Good with Google Sheets / Excel
Self-starter who is eager to learn and grow




What You Get:

Real sales experience with premium hospitality brands
Direct mentorship from founders
Certificate & Letter of Recommendation
Opportunity for full-time conversion

title: Associate Analyst
description:
Organization: At Comm-Bank, we never lose sight of the role we play in other people’s financial wellbeing. Our focus is to help people and businesses move forward to progress. To make the right financial decisions and achieve their dreams, targets, and aspirations. Regardless of where you work within our organisation, your initiative, talent, ideas, and energy all contribute to the impact that we can make with our work. Together we can achieve great things.

Job Title: Associate Analyst

Location: Bangalore

Business & Team: COO - Retail Operations – Compliance Investigations/Disputes

Impact & contribution: As an Associate Analyst, you will be a self-starter who is passionate about delivering world class customer service, building strong relationships with the stakeholders and you will possess the following attributes:


A Can-do attitude, with the ability to work toward measures that deliver to customer experience and service quality
Demonstrating the ability to grasp concepts in a fast-changing environment.


Reporting lines:

Associate Analyst reports directly to the Manager of the Disputes/Compliance Operations Manager


Applicable to Only Level 3 and above


Roles & Responsibilities: You will be expected to perform the following tasks in a manner consistent with CBA’s Values and People Capabilities.

Core responsibilities:


Analyse disputed card transaction for both fraud and non-fraud transaction by investigating, exploring opportunities to identify recovery and mitigate losses and documenting and resolving claims.


Information and Payment required received from Government agencies/Local court are actioned with due diligence with quality outcome.


Engaging with both internal and external stakeholders to assist with investigation on root cause of losses
Analysing transaction challenges which cause chargeback losses and troubleshooting to determine the issue and working with subject matter experts to identify and execute solution
Work with clients to collect and document information that may be used to resolving outstanding disputes
Ensuring that all the Disputes cases are handled in accordance with the regulatory Requirement.


Essential Skills:


Fresher or 1-3 years’ experience working in a Banking role (preferably Cards/Statutory Compliance processes)
Knowledge on the Disputes resolution/statutory compliance process will be an advantage.
Proven ability to effectively plan and coordinate incoming work and enquiries
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Excellent Communication and stakeholder management skills, support by collaboration mindset and possess a service-based mindset with strong customer focus.
Proven analytical, and problem-solving skills alongside deriving solutions for customers.
Highly motivated, result driven, team and customer focused
Detail Oriented - Exercise extreme attention to details; is thorough, accurate, organized, and productive and seeks to understand both cause and effect of a situation.
Good Judgement - The exercise of Critical thinking, analysing, assessing and taking ownership of outcome.


Qualifications:


Fresher (Graduate or postgraduate, preferable Commerce/Finance Background)


If you're already part of the Commonwealth Bank Group (including Bankwest, x15ventures), you'll need to apply through Sidekick to submit a valid application. We’re keen to support you with the next step in your career.

We're aware of some accessibility issues on this site, particularly for screen reader users. We want to make finding your dream job as easy as possible, so if you require additional support please contact HR Direct on 1800 989 696.

Advertising End Date: 21/04/2026

title: Engineering Trainee
description:
Role Overview

We are hiring Engineering Trainees to join our engineering teams and work on real

production systems under defined supervision and structured processes. This role is

designed for individuals who want a serious start in software engineering and are

comfortable working with responsibility from an early stage.

This is not an internship or learning-only role.

Key Responsibilities

As an Engineering Trainee, you will be expected to:


Work on assigned development tasks across backend and/or frontend systems
Implement features and fixes strictly as per provided specifications
Follow established coding standards, version control, and review processes
Assist in bug fixing and issue resolution under senior engineer supervision
Participate in testing, validation, and release preparation activities
Write clean, readable, and review-ready code
Maintain basic technical documentation for assigned work
Address code review feedback accurately and within agreed timelines


Expectations & Work Discipline


Strong adherence to engineering processes and instructions
Accuracy, completeness, and ownership of assigned tasks
Clear communication of blockers or uncertainties
Willingness to learn through reviews and feedback
Professional conduct in an onsite, collaborative work environment


Eligibility


Engineering / Computer Science graduate or equivalent
Trained fresher or up to 1 year of experience
Strong fundamentals in programming and software development concepts
Familiarity with Git or version control is preferred

title: Fresher- Recruitment Trainee
description:
Position: Fresher- Recruitment Trainee

Locations: Bangalore

Job Type: Full Time

Work Type: Onsite

Shift Timing: Night Shifts

Timing: 6:30 PM to 3:30 AM IST (Monday to Friday)

Transportation: Both Pick and Drop




Overview




TekWissen Group is a workforce management provider throughout India and many other countries in the world.




Job Description:




We are hiring passionate and motivated fresh graduates who are eager to build a career in US IT Recruitment.
As a US IT Recruiter, you will be responsible for sourcing, screening, and submitting potential candidates for various IT positions with our clients in the United States.
You will work closely with Account Managers and delivery leads to understand client requirements and ensure timely and quality submissions.
This is a full-time onsite position designed to train and mold freshers into skilled recruitment professionals in the highly dynamic US staffing industry.

Responsibilities:

Understanding Client Requirements (IT or Non-IT)
Regularly interact with Account Managers and Team Leads to get complete clarity on job requirements.
Understand the technical and functional aspects of each job role (skills, experience level, domain, and location).
Prioritize open requisitions based on urgency and importance.

Candidate Sourcing & Screening:

Use various sourcing channels such as job portals (Dice, Monster, CareerBuilder, etc.), LinkedIn, internal databases, networking, and referrals.
Perform keyword searches and Boolean searches to identify suitable profiles.
Screen candidates through phone/video interviews to evaluate communication skills, technical capabilities, availability, and salary expectations.
Ensure a high level of candidate quality before submission.

Resume Submission & Coordination:

Format and present resumes professionally before sharing with the Account Manager or client.
Maintain a quick turnaround time for candidate submissions to meet tight deadlines.
Follow up regularly with candidates to ensure their availability and interest.
Coordinate interviews between candidates and clients; track feedback and results.

Recruitment Tools & Documentation:

Maintain accurate records of candidate details, job status, and communication history using Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS).
Update internal databases and track candidate progress throughout the recruitment lifecycle.

Required Skills & Qualifications:

Education: Bachelor's degree (Any discipline).
Excellent communication skills is a must (spoken and written English).
Strong interpersonal skills, positive attitude, and willingness to learn.
Ability to multitask, prioritize, and work in a fast-paced environment and Proficient in using MS Office tools.




TekWissen Group is an equal opportunity employer supporting workforce diversity.

title: Walk in Drive For MBA Freshers (Finance) on 15th April-Bangalore
description:
Greeting from Infosys BPM Ltd.,




We are hiring the candidates from MBA Finance Fresher for US Payments Settlement Operations, Chargeback & Merchant Tax Reporting domain for Bangalore location. Please walk-in for interview on 15th April 2026 at Bangalore Location.




Note: Please carry copy of this email to the venue and make sure you register your application before attending the walk-in.




Please use below link to apply and register your application.

https://career.infosys.com/jobdesc?jobReferenceCode=PROGEN-EXTERNAL-240625




Please mention the generated Candidate ID on the top corner of your Resume ***




Interview details:

Interview Date: 15th April 2026

Interview Time: 10:00 AM to 12:30 PM IST ONLY




Interview Venue:

Bangalore, E-City Phase-2, Infosys Limited, No. 40/P-41/P, Gate: 2, Electronic City phase 2, Industrial Area, Konappana Agrahara, Bangalore-560100.

Landmark: In Between Sunik Industries and Tejas Networks.




Please find below Job Details for your reference:

Designation: Senior Process Executive

Job Level: 2A

Experience: Freshers Only- 0 yrs

Shifts: Flexible to work for any shift

Notice Period - Immediate Joiners only

Work Location: Bangalore (Work from Office)

Qualification: MBA in Finance (Full Time)- Year of Passing - 2024 & 2025 only.




Note:

Post Graduation (MBA) and Under Graduation (B.Com/BBA) is a must from (Finance) background.
Candidate should have all original marksheets and PDC of both UG and PG degree will be permitted.
Candidates waiting for final results are not eligible
Pursuing Candidates are not eligible




JOB DESCRIPTION:




1. US Payment Settlement Operations:




Role Summary:

Execute daytoday settlement balancing and routine exception handling across Direct and Indirect portfolios, ensuring accurate funding and timely closure of issues under maker checker controls.




Required Skills:

Strong reconciliation mindset, Excel (vlookups/pivots), basic SQL preferred.
Familiarity with ACH/NACHA, wire funding basics, and card brand settlement cycles.
Clear written/verbal communication; disciplined with SOPs and maker checker protocols.




2. Merchant Tax Reporting:




Overview:

These five JDs cover roles across the US Payment Merchant Taxation process. The scope spans three sub-modules:

(A) State Tax Levy Process intake and processing of IRS/state levy letters, merchant identification, 24-hour holds, collections, cheque requests, and accounting disbursements;

(B) Merchant Tax Reporting liaison with US customers and the IRS for Tax Identification Number (TIN/EIN) accuracy;

(C) Escheatment identification and reporting of unclaimed property to state treasuries as per state laws.




Role Summary:

Execute daily operations across State Tax Levy, Merchant Tax Reporting, and Escheatment with high accuracy and TAT adherence; maintain audit-ready documentation and follow maker checker controls.




Key Responsibilities:

Open/log levy/IRS letters; identify merchant; check activity status; place 24-hour holds for active merchants.
Calculate and initiate collections; raise cheque requests; coordinate with Accounting for disbursements.
For inactive merchants, prepare and dispatch appropriate responses as per SOPs.
Validate TIN/EIN against internal/IRS records; liaise with clients for corrections; update systems (Merchant Tax Reporting).
Identify dormant/unclaimed assets; validate eligibility; prepare due diligence outreach; support state-wise reporting and remittance (Escheatment).
Maintain evidence packs and audit trails; ensure data privacy and document retention standards.
Meet daily SLA targets on productivity, TAT, and quality.




3. Chargeback & Dispute Management:




Role Summary:

Own end-to-end merchant dispute handling across Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover, including chargeback, representment, pre-arbitration, and arbitration. Maximize recovery, ensure rule compliance, and deliver a strong merchant experience under network SLAs.




Required Qualifications:

Merchant disputes & chargebacks across Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover.
Practical exposure to VCR/MDR workflows and phases (chargeback representment pre-arb arbitration).
Experience drafting reason-code-specific narratives and assembling CE.
Hands-on with VROL, Mastercom/Claims Manager, Amex/Discover portals; CRM/ticketing tools.
Strong analytical and written skills; ability to interpret payment data/logs to build a defensible case.
High ownership, urgency, and resilience under tight deadlines; willingness to work US hours onsite (no hybrid/remote).




Documents to Carry:

Carry a printout your updated resume.
Carry any 2 photo Identity proof (PAN Card/Driving License/Voters ID card/Passport).
All original education documents needs to be available for verification. (10th, 12th, Graduation (Sem Wise Marksheet, CMM. Provisional and Original Degree).




Mandatory to Carry:

Smartphone with good front camera, charger and Headset for Assessment, Government ID proof Hardcopy.




Pointers to note:

Please do not carry laptops/cameras to the venue as these will not be allowed due to security restrictions.
Original Government ID card is must for Security Clearance




Regards,

Infosys BPM Recruitment team

title: External Graduate
description:
This role has been designated as ‘Remote/Teleworker’, which means you will primarily work from home.

Who We Are

Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge-to-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.

Job Description

Additional Skills:

Accountability, Accountability, Action Planning, Active Learning, Active Listening, Bias, Business Growth, Business Planning, Coaching, Commercial Acumen, Creativity, Critical Thinking, Cross-Functional Teamwork, Customer Experience Strategy, Customer Solutions, Data Analysis Management, Data Collection Management (Inactive), Data Controls, Design Thinking, Empathy, Follow-Through, Growth Mindset, Intellectual Curiosity (Inactive), Long Term Planning, Managing Ambiguity {+ 5 more}

What We Can Offer You

Health & Wellbeing

We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.

Personal & Professional Development

We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.

Unconditional Inclusion

We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.

Let's Stay Connected

Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.

Job

Services

Job Level

Entry

HPE is an Equal Employment Opportunity/ Veterans/Disabled/LGBT employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, or any other protected category, and all decisions we make are made on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. Our goal is to be one global team that is representative of our customers, in an inclusive environment where we can continue to innovate and grow together. Please click here: Equal Employment Opportunity.

Hewlett Packard Enterprise is EEO Protected Veteran/ Individual with Disabilities.

HPE will comply with all applicable laws related to employer use of arrest and conviction records, including laws requiring employers to consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories.

No Fees Notice & Recruitment Fraud Disclaimer

It has come to HPE’s attention that there has been an increase in recruitment fraud whereby scammer impersonate HPE or HPE-authorized recruiting agencies and offer fake employment opportunities to candidates. These scammers often seek to obtain personal information or money from candidates.

Please note that Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), its direct and indirect subsidiaries and affiliated companies, and its authorized recruitment agencies/vendors will never charge any candidate a registration fee, hiring fee, or any other fee in connection with its recruitment and hiring process. The credentials of any hiring agency that claims to be working with HPE for recruitment of talent should be verified by candidates and candidates shall be solely responsible to conduct such verification. Any candidate/individual who relies on the erroneous representations made by fraudulent employment agencies does so at their own risk, and HPE disclaims liability for any damages or claims that may result from any such communication.

title: Technical Support Engineer(Freshers)
description:
Job Title: Technical Support Representative
Company: Lenovo India Pvt. Ltd.
Work Schedule: Monday to Sunday | General Shift | 5 Days Working (Roster Based)

About the Role
Lenovo India Pvt. Ltd. is looking for a polite, professional, and customer-focused Technical Support Representative to join our contact center operations. The role involves providing end-to-end technical assistance, resolving customer issues, and ensuring a seamless customer experience across phone, email, and chat support.

Key Responsibilities

Respond promptly and professionally to customer queries via phone, email, and chat

Identify customer needs, research issues, and provide accurate solutions or alternatives

Diagnose and troubleshoot technical issues related to Lenovo products, Windows OS, and applications

Provide step-by-step guidance to customers for issue resolution

Educate users on product features, platform functionality, and best practices

Maintain detailed records of customer interactions in CRM systems

Follow SOPs and escalate unresolved issues to internal teams when required

Collaborate with internal teams to ensure faster issue resolution

Capture customer feedback and share insights for continuous improvement

Participate in training programs to enhance product and technical knowledge

Adhere to all company policies and procedures

Eligibility & Requirements
Must Have

Fluency in spoken & written English

Fluency in spoken Hindi (mandatory)

Knowledge of Basic PC Hardware & Windows OS

Typing speed of ≥30 WPM with ≥98% accuracy
Should Have

Strong problem-solving and customer-handling skills

Good reading, comprehension, and communication skills

Basic understanding of PC working principles


Good to Have

Knowledge of Lenovo products and call center processes

Windows 10/11 installation & troubleshooting

Driver installation and application troubleshooting

Hardware certifications (added advantage)

Basic sales support / upselling knowledge


Skills Assessed

Communication (Reading, Speaking, Listening)

Technical knowledge (Products, Windows OS, Call Center basics)

Typing skills (Online Typing Test)

Interview & Assessment evaluations

Interested candidates kindly share your updated resume to jishnu.s@joulestowatts.co

title: Inside Sales Specialist (fresher)
description:
Company Description


Ayati Devices Pvt. Ltd., established on February 9, 2019, in Mumbai, specializes in innovative healthcare solutions in diabetes care. The company focuses on developing cutting-edge devices, such as a diabetic foot screener that enhances clinical efficiency and accuracy. This device aids clinicians in diagnostics and helps neuropathic patients monitor their conditions for better treatment outcomes. Ayati Devices is committed to improving healthcare through technological advancements that benefit patients and practitioners alike.


Role Description


This is a full-time remote role for an Inside Sales Specialist (Fresher). The Inside Sales Specialist will be responsible for generating leads, cultivating customer relationships, and contributing to sales strategies. Daily tasks include managing customer inquiries, ensuring customer satisfaction, conducting follow-ups, and converting leads to sales opportunities. The candidate will also collaborate with the sales team to achieve business targets and deliver an excellent customer experience.


Qualifications

Proficiency in Inside Sales and Lead Generation techniques for identifying and pursuing sales opportunities
Strong Communication skills to interact effectively with clients and team members
Customer Service and Customer Satisfaction skills to build relationships and maintain a positive client experience
Problem-solving skills and a customer-focused mindset to address client needs effectively
Ability to work both collaboratively with a team and independently in a remote environment
Bachelor's degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field is preferred
Familiarity with healthcare or medical technologies is a plus, but not mandatory

title: Financial Analyst, GFS FP&A
description:
Description

About the Organization: Amazon is a US-based multinational electronic commerce company headquartered in Seattle, Washington. Amazon.com started as an online bookstore, but soon diversified into many other categories, with a vision to be earth's most customer-centric company & to build a place where people can come to find and discover anything they might want to buy online.

About the role: Amazon's Global Finance Solutions (GFS) team is a fast-paced, team-focused, dynamic environment and delivering great experiences for our customers is top priority. GFS is seeking a Financial Analyst for EU CCT Finance team. The candidate would be responsible for financial close and performing related reporting, accruals etc. Additionally, the role would support monthly P&L analysis, perform financial reporting and forecasts, use financial systems and advanced MS Excel functions to work with large data sets, and perform headcount reporting, planning and forecasting. Additional responsibilities would include establishing, measuring and monitoring weekly KPI metric discussions for new and/or existing business initiatives and operational performance and assisting in measuring and reporting progress on key goals for the business team in a timely and accurate manner. The candidate would also perform ad-hoc business analyses and financial modeling, provide inputs for monthly and quarterly business reviews in a timely manner, facilitate business reviews with data analysis, identify and implement solutions to resolve, improve, automate, standardize, or simplify finance processes, and identify incomplete or inaccurate data, root cause of data issues, escalate discrepancies, fix data where possible or partner to deliver a solution.

Basic Qualifications


Experience using data to influence business decisions
CA fresher / 1+ years of experience in FP&A, closing of Books of accounts and reporting & analytics


Preferred Qualifications


Experience in managing, evaluating, analyzing data quickly and creating meaningful business reporting.
Good financial acumen with problem-solving and decision-making skills.
Manage competing priorities and meet deadlines.
Good interpersonal skills — including written and oral communication skills.
Advanced proficiency in Excel.
Retail industry experience.
Experience in VBA, COGNOS and SQL is a plus.


Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.


Company - ADCI - Karnataka

title: Junior Process Analyst -RCM
description:
Huron helps its clients drive growth, enhance performance and sustain leadership in the markets they serve. We help healthcare organizations build innovation capabilities and accelerate key growth initiatives, enabling organizations to own the future, instead of being disrupted by it. Together, we empower clients to create sustainable growth, optimize internal processes and deliver better consumer outcomes.

Health systems, hospitals and medical clinics are under immense pressure to improve clinical outcomes and reduce the cost of providing patient care. Investing in new partnerships, clinical services and technology is not enough to create meaningful and substantive change. To succeed long-term, healthcare organizations must empower leaders, clinicians, employees, affiliates and communities to build cultures that foster innovation to achieve the best outcomes for patients.

Joining the Huron team means you’ll help our clients evolve and adapt to the rapidly changing healthcare environment and optimize existing business operations, improve clinical outcomes, create a more consumer-centric healthcare experience, and drive physician, patient and employee engagement across the enterprise.

Join our team as the expert you are now and create your future.

Job Details


Willing to work in US shift timings.
To answer insurance telephone inquiries.
Perform pre-call analysis and check the status by calling the payer or using IVR or web portal services.
Record after-call actions and perform post call analysis for the claim follow-up.


Job Description Role:- RCM Accounts Receivable(AR) - Fresher

JOB DETAILS:


Willing to work in US shift timings.
To answer insurance telephone inquiries
Perform pre-call analysis and check the status by calling the payer or using IVR or web portal services.
Record after-call actions and perform post call analysis for the claim follow-up.
Assess and resolve inquiries, requests, and complaints through calling to ensure those customer inquiries are resolved at the first point of contact
Perform analysis of accounts receivable data and understand the reasons for underpayment, days in A/R, top denial reasons, use appropriate codes to be used in documentation of the reasons for denials/underpayments.
Solve complex scope wise problems with little or no supervision from lead.
Interact with key stakeholders.
Flexible to work in the projects assigned
Net typing speed of 30 words per min & above with an accuracy rate of 90%
Good knowledge about MS Office tool
Solve complex scope wise problems with little or no supervision from lead
Develop in-depth knowledge of business processes facilitated by our software products
Develop in-depth knowledge of operational processes around the scope of work.
Troubleshoot deployment and environmental issues, resolve issues in a timely manner across multiple projects.


QUALIFICATIONS:


Experience: Fresher (0 to 5 months)
Good comm skills with neutral accent

title: Finance & Accounts Associate
description:
Job Description – CA Fresher




Role Details

Job Title: Finance & Accounts Associate
Experience: 1–3 years (CA Fresher)
Location: Bangalore
Type: Full-time | In-office
Reporting to: Finance Controller




About the Role

We are looking for a dynamic CA Fresher who is eager to take ownership, learn fast, and contribute across finance, accounting, tax, and business operations. As a startup, we move quickly—you will work directly with leadership and get hands-on exposure to all core finance work.




Key Responsibilities

Accounting & Financial Reporting
Prepare monthly financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow).
Ensure accurate books of accounts as per Ind AS / Companies Act.
Manage reconciliations (bank, vendor, inter-company, GST, TDS).
Support month-end and year-end closing processes.
Taxation & Compliance
Handle GST working: input reconciliation, GSTR-1 & 3B support.
TDS computation, returns, and payment tracking.
Assist in corporate tax working and statutory audit requirements.
Internal Controls & Processes
Set up or strengthen basic finance processes (procure-to-pay, order-to-cash).
Work on cost tracking, budgeting, and process improvements.
Help build MIS dashboards and KPI reports for leadership.
Business Finance Support
Work with operations, marketing, and product teams on financial impact assessment.
Vendor & Payables Management
Review invoices, agreements, and ensure timely payments.
Evaluate vendor cost efficiencies and suggest optimisations.




What We’re Looking For

Chartered Accountant (Newly Qualified).
Strong understanding of accounting, audit, GST, and direct tax basics.
Proficiency in Excel/Google Sheets; knowledge of Tally is a plus.
Analytical mindset with attention to detail.
Ability to work in fast-paced, ambiguous startup environments.
Good communication and problem-solving skills.




What You’ll Gain

End-to-end exposure to finance in a fast-growing startup.
Opportunity to work directly with founders.
Ownership of key finance functions early in your career.
High learning curve across accounting, business finance, and strategy.

title: Financial Analyst, GFS FP&A
description:
Description

About the Organization: Amazon is a US-based multinational electronic commerce company headquartered in Seattle, Washington. Amazon.com started as an online bookstore, but soon diversified into many other categories, with a vision to be earth's most customer-centric company & to build a place where people can come to find and discover anything they might want to buy online.

About the role: Amazon's Global Finance Solutions (GFS) team is a fast-paced, team-focused, dynamic environment and delivering great experiences for our customers is top priority. GFS is seeking a Financial Analyst for AWS Services Finance team. The candidate would be responsible for financial close and performing related reporting, accruals etc. Additionally, the role would support monthly P&L analysis, perform financial reporting and forecasts, use financial systems and advanced MS Excel functions to work with large data sets, and perform headcount reporting, planning and forecasting. Additional responsibilities would include establishing, measuring and monitoring weekly KPI metric discussions for new and/or existing business initiatives and operational performance and assisting in measuring and reporting progress on key goals for the business team in a timely and accurate manner. The candidate would also perform ad-hoc business analyses and financial modeling, provide inputs for monthly and quarterly business reviews in a timely manner, facilitate business reviews with data analysis, identify and implement solutions to resolve, improve, automate, standardize, or simplify finance processes, and identify incomplete or inaccurate data, root cause of data issues, escalate discrepancies, fix data where possible or partner to deliver a solution.

Basic Qualifications


Experience using data to influence business decisions
CA fresher / 1+ years of experience in FP&A, closing of Books of accounts and reporting & analytics


Preferred Qualifications


Experience in managing, evaluating, analyzing data quickly and creating meaningful business reporting.
Good financial acumen with problem-solving and decision-making skills.
Manage competing priorities and meet deadlines.
Good interpersonal skills — including written and oral communication skills.
Advanced proficiency in Excel.
Retail industry experience.
Experience in VBA, COGNOS and SQL is a plus.


Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

title: Walk-in || Fresher Hiring For Airport Ground Staff
description:
Job Description: Airstriprealtech is seeking enthusiastic and motivated individuals to join our team as Airport Ground Staff. As a member of our ground staff team, you will be responsible for ensuring the safety and comfort of our passengers while they are on the ground. This is a great opportunity for freshers to kickstart their career in the aviation industry. Key Responsibilities: 1. Greet and assist passengers with check-in, baggage, and boarding procedures. 2. Ensure the safety and security of passengers and their belongings. 3. Provide excellent customer service to passengers by addressing their inquiries and concerns. 4. Handle and resolve any customer complaints or issues in a professional manner. 5. Assist in the boarding process and ensure all passengers are seated and ready for takeoff. 6. Communicate effectively with other ground staff, flight crew, and airport personnel. 7. Ensure the timely and efficient flow of passengers through the airport. 8. Monitor flight schedules and make necessary announcements. 9. Follow all safety and security procedures as per company policies and regulations. 10. Maintain a clean and organized work environment. Requirements: 1. Minimum qualification of 10+2 or equivalent. 2. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills. 3. Ability to work in a fast-paced and dynamic environment. 4. Customer service-oriented with a positive attitude. 5. Basic computer skills. 6. Willingness to work in shifts, including nights and weekends. 7. Must be physically fit and able to lift heavy baggage. 8. Prior experience in the aviation industry is a plus, but not required. We offer a competitive salary package and benefits, along with opportunities for growth and development within the company. If you have a passion for the aviation industry and a desire to provide exceptional customer service, then we want to hear from you! Apply now to join our team as an Airport Ground Staff.

title: Artificial Intelligence Intern
description:
About the Company

ZeTheta Algorithms Private Limited (www.zetheta.com) is a FinTech start-up which has been recently set up and is developing innovative AI tools.

https://www.instagram.com/zetheta.official/




About the Role

We are seeking a talented and motivated student/ fresher intern to develop AI models from scratch within a 2 month timeframe. This is an extraordinary opportunity for a self-driven, technically skilled student to build a complete enterprise-grade system that incorporates cutting-edge AI technologies including deep learning.




Responsibilities

Design and implement the complete AI Models following provided specifications
Develop both frontend and backend components of the platform
Create and integrate AI modules
Design and optimize database schema and queries
Ensure system security, especially for sensitive identity verification data
Deploy the solution using zero-cost cloud services
Document code, APIs, and system architecture
Complete the entire project within the 2 month timeline




Qualifications

No experience required. Preferably, a student who is currently pursuing or fresh graduate who has recently completed a degree in Computer Science, AI/ML, or related field.




Required Skills (permitted to use all LLMs)

Strong programming skills in Python and JavaScript
Understanding of React.js for frontend development and Node.js for backend
Knowledge of FastAPI or similar Python web frameworks
Familiarity with database design and SQL (particularly PostgreSQL with Supabase)
Deployment on AWS with CD/ CI Pipelines and Manual Environment in EC2 instance, S3
Understanding of basic machine learning concepts
Self-motivated with ability to work independently




Preferred Skills (permitted to use all LLMs)

Sound knowledge of AI/ML libraries (TensorFlow, Keras, HuggingFace Transformers)
Familiarity with computer vision techniques using OpenCV
Knowledge of natural language processing concepts
Sound knowledge of facial recognition or emotion detection systems
Understanding of identity verification methodologies
Docker containerization experience
Prior work with cloud deployment (AWS)




Who Should Apply?

Student or fresh graduate from any academic discipline.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Basic knowledge of Microsoft Office.
Willingness to self-learn and work in a fast-paced environment.




Internship Details

Duration: Self paced, options for 15days or 1,2,3,4 or 6 months.
Type: Unpaid

title: HR Intern
description:
Instawork is on a mission to create meaningful economic opportunities for skilled hourly professionals in communities around the globe. Our AI-powered labor marketplace helps local businesses scale, and enables global technology companies to push the frontiers of robotics and AI. Backed by world-class investors like Benchmark, Spark Capital, Craft Ventures, Greylock, Y Combinator, and others, we’re looking for exceptional talent to reimagine the way the world works.

Location: Kormangala, Bangalore

Working Days: 6 Days a Week

Experience: Fresher (0–1 year)

Duration: 3 months

About the Role:

We are looking for a proactive and energetic HR Intern to support our day-to-day recruitment activities. This role is perfect for someone who wants to kick-start their career in HR, enjoys interacting with people, and thrives in a fast-paced startup environment.

Key Responsibilities:


Support end-to-end hiring for fresher and entry-level roles
Source, screen, and call candidates for various positions
Schedule and coordinate interviews with hiring panels
Maintain candidate trackers and ensure timely follow-ups
Assist in releasing offer letters and completing onboarding documentation
Ensure strong communication and coordination between candidates and internal stakeholders
Contribute to improving hiring processes and candidate experience



Requirements:


Good written and verbal communication skills
Strong organizational and follow-up abilities
Proactive attitude and willingness to learn
Comfortable working in a dynamic startup environment
Ability to manage multiple tasks at once
Available to work 6 days a week



Additional information:


Free Lunch + Snacks Daily
Cool workspace and fun team environment
Exclusive project goodies



Our Values


Empathy, Trust & Candor We put ourselves in the shoes of our colleagues and customers and don’t shy away from uncomfortable conversations, instead building trust through honest and direct feedback.
Bias for Action We practice high-velocity decision-making, clear-eyed that we often operate with incomplete information. Growing quickly means it’s OK to be wrong, so long as we learn from our mistakes and course correct!
Always Be Learning We’re a curious bunch, and with AI transforming our workplace we encourage everyone to learn from each other, compounding our knowledge and experience to help us change an entire industry.
Act Like an Owner We work long, hard, and smart, building products that delight our users and drive growth. Your ability to impact Instawork is limited only by your courage and conviction, not your job description.



About Instawork

Founded in 2015, Instawork is the nation’s leading online labor marketplace for food services, hospitality, light industry, and logistics, connecting more than 7M skilled workers with local restaurants, hotels, warehouses, stadiums, and more. Our AI-powered platform serves thousands of businesses across more than 50 major markets in the United States and Canada. We're not just helping fill shifts, we're supporting local economies—and we're just getting started!

Instawork has been featured by CBS News, The Wall Street Journal, The Washington Post, and the Associated Press. Forbes included us on their Next Billion Dollar Startups list; RetailTech Breakthrough named us Workforce Hiring Solution of the Year for 2025; and Inc. 5000 recognized us as one of the country's top 10% fastest-growing companies two years in a row. But what matters most is our impact. We're solving real problems for real people, and we’re doing it at scale.

Join our team to help us build something that matters! We’re looking for superstars who want to help us shape the future of work. With hubs in San Francisco, Bangalore, and Chicago, city offices in New York, Phoenix, and Singapore, we're back to working together in-person five days a week because we believe the best ideas happen when great people collaborate face-to-face. We also value diverse perspectives and encourage applications from candidates of all backgrounds.

Ready to make an impact? Learn more at www.instawork.com/about.

Personnel Privacy Policy

title: Sales Associate & Intern
description:
Location: Bengaluru (Indiranagar)

Reporting to: Sales Manager

Full Time: Fresher to 2 years

Internship: at least 3 months mandatory




About Lane

At Lane, we’re reimagining how India learns driving and experiences car ownership. From structured driving programs to car buying & selling within our trusted community, we’re building a tech-enabled mobility ecosystem for first-time drivers. With 15,000+ registrations and strong early traction, we’re scaling fast — and sales sits at the heart of our growth journey.




Role Overview

As a Sales Associate & Intern, you will drive revenue by converting high-intent leads into paying customers. You’ll work closely with marketing, operations, and customer success teams to ensure a seamless experience from first interaction to onboarding. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys speaking with customers, understands consultative selling, and wants to grow in a fast-paced startup environment.




Key Responsibilities

Convert inbound leads into customers via calls and WhatsApp
Understand customer requirements and recommend the right driving package
Manage follow-ups and maintain strong pipeline hygiene
Track daily conversions and revenue targets
Coordinate with operations for smooth onboarding
Maintain CRM data accuracy
Identify customer objections and improve pitch quality
Upsell relevant services (RTO assistance, car buying support, etc.)




What We’re Looking For

Fresher to 2 years of experience in inside sales / telesales / EdTech / mobility / service sales
Strong communication skills (English + Hindi preferred; Kannada is a bonus)
High ownership mindset
Comfortable working with targets and performance metrics
Basic understanding of Google Sheets / CRM tools
Ability to handle objections confidently
Startup attitude — adaptable, fast learner, action-oriented




What You’ll Gain

Direct exposure to startup growth and revenue strategy
Clear performance metrics & learning curve
Opportunity to grow into senior sales / city lead roles
High ownership from Day 1
Work closely with founders




Why Join Lane?

Because we’re not just selling driving lessons — we’re building confidence, independence, and a trusted car ownership ecosystem for India’s next generation of drivers. If you’re excited about mobility, growth, and building something meaningful — we’d love to meet you.

Lekhak.app is innovating at the intersection of technology and language, empowering individuals and organizations to break language barriers effortlessly.
